title: ottleya grandiflora
intro: Ottleya grandiflora, also known as the 'Desert Marigold', is a flowering plant native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico, characterized by its bright yellow and orange blooms. The plant is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Ottleya grandiflora include soothing digestive issues, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma. Ottleya grandiflora can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, making it a versatile herbal remedy for promoting overall well-being.
